content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 7, 5), (2, 9, 5), (4, 9, 7), (6, 9, 8), (8, 9, 8), (2, 5, 10), (5, 8, 12), (5, 7, 13), (1, 8, 14), (3, 5, 15), (4, 5, 15), (7, 8, 16), (0, 1, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 13.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 13:

* Edge (2, 7, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 7, 13) has node 5 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 8, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 5, 15) has node 3 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 5, 15) has node 4 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (7, 8, 16) has node 7 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 1, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 1.

Now we have the following nodes matched at time 13:
2, 5, 7, 8

Answer: [2, 5, 7, 8]
